statement: If the time-readout mismatch is controlled by a nonnegative residual-blind source load L, and the readout response must be dimensionless, monotone, null-recovering, and bounded by a small clock-mismatch cap epsilon_cap, then the minimal saturating one-parameter map is epsilon_t=epsilon_cap L/(1+L).
open_part: universal or class-specific origin of epsilon_cap
